name: Soft Sugar Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Butter or margarine,  see note
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the butter or margarine.
2. In a large mixing bowl, cream together the butter and sugar.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. In a separate bowl, combine flour, baking soda, baking powder, and 1 1/2 teaspoons of cardamom. Alternately add these dry ingredients with milk to the creamed mixture.
5. Mix remaining sugar and cardamom in a small bowl. Dip rounded teaspoonfuls of dough into this mixture.
6. Place the dough on greased baking sheets.
7. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 10-12 minutes or until lightly browned. Do not overbake.
8. Cool on wire racks.
This recipe is from the December/January 1995 issue of Taste of Home.
